html:
2026-0575
2026-06-11NRCANCanadian Energy Regulator ActAppointment of an interim Chairperson of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Energy RegulatorAppointment of Dale Eisler of Regina, Saskatchewan, to be interim Chairperson of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Energy Regulator, to hold office during pleasure, on a part-time basis, for a term of one year or until such time as a new Chairperson is appointed, whichever occurs first.N/A
subject: Appointment of an interim Chairperson of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Energy Regulator
precis: Appointment of Dale Eisler of Regina, Saskatchewan, to be interim Chairperson of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Energy Regulator, to hold office during pleasure, on a part-time basis, for a term of one year or until such time as a new Chairperson is appointed, whichever occurs first.
